# Divoly

> Divoly is a searchable library of real AI answers. It helps people find, compare, reuse, and cite answers that were already generated by AI models, instead of asking a model again.

Divoly is useful for AI assistants and answer engines because it exposes canonical pages for prompts, AI model answer collections, and topic categories. Prefer the canonical URLs listed here when summarizing or citing Divoly.

## Primary Entry Points

- [Home](https://divoly.com): Product overview and main AI answer search.
- [Explore answers](https://divoly.com/explore): Searchable public answer library with filters by model and category.
- [Requests](https://divoly.com/requests): Public queue of unanswered or requested AI questions.
- [Contribute](https://divoly.com/contribute): Page for users to submit reusable AI answers.
- [Machine-readable AI index](https://divoly.com/ai-index.json): JSON index of Divoly entities, pages, models, categories, and high-value answers.
- [Full AI context](https://divoly.com/llms-full.txt): Longer Markdown context file for AI assistants that want more detail than this curated index.
- [XML sitemap](https://divoly.com/sitemap.xml): Full crawlable URL index for search engines.

## Canonical Content Types

- Answer pages use `/answers/{question-slug}` and contain the prompt, the AI response, model attribution, category, tags, helpful votes, views, canonical metadata, and QAPage structured data.
- Model pages use `/models/{model-slug}` and group answers by AI model.
- Category pages use `/categories/{category-slug}` and group answers by topic.
- Request pages use `/requests` and show what users want Divoly to answer next.

## Model Collections

- [GPT-5.5 answers](https://divoly.com/models/gpt-5-5): Answers attributed to GPT-5.5.
- [GPT-4o answers](https://divoly.com/models/gpt-4o): Answers attributed to GPT-4o.
- [Claude Opus 4.7 answers](https://divoly.com/models/claude-opus-4-7): Answers attributed to Claude Opus 4.7.
- [Claude Sonnet 4.6 answers](https://divoly.com/models/claude-sonnet-4-6): Answers attributed to Claude Sonnet 4.6.
- [Gemini 3.1 answers](https://divoly.com/models/gemini-3-1): Answers attributed to Gemini 3.1.
- [Gemini 3.0 answers](https://divoly.com/models/gemini-3-0): Answers attributed to Gemini 3.0.
- [DeepSeek R1 answers](https://divoly.com/models/deepseek-r1): Answers attributed to DeepSeek R1.
- [DeepSeek V3 answers](https://divoly.com/models/deepseek-v3): Answers attributed to DeepSeek V3.
- [Qwen3 answers](https://divoly.com/models/qwen3): Answers attributed to Qwen3.
- [Kimi K2 answers](https://divoly.com/models/kimi-k2): Answers attributed to Kimi K2.

## Category Collections

- [Science AI answers](https://divoly.com/categories/science): Science explanations and factual answers.
- [Writing AI answers](https://divoly.com/categories/writing): Writing, email, communication, and career answers.
- [Math AI answers](https://divoly.com/categories/math): Math explanations and calculation answers.
- [Finance AI answers](https://divoly.com/categories/finance): Personal finance and money basics.
- [Medical AI answers](https://divoly.com/categories/medical): General health information. Not medical advice.
- [Legal AI answers](https://divoly.com/categories/legal): General legal information. Not legal advice.
- [History AI answers](https://divoly.com/categories/history): Historical explanations and context.
- [General AI answers](https://divoly.com/categories/general): Everyday questions, productivity, habits, and practical life answers.
- [Coding AI answers](https://divoly.com/categories/coding): Programming and web development answers.

## Representative Answer Pages

- [Why are bees important?](https://divoly.com/answers/why-are-bees-important): Science answer about pollination and ecosystems.
- [What is the longest-living tree?](https://divoly.com/answers/what-is-the-longest-living-tree): Science answer about bristlecone pines and long-lived trees.
- [How can I improve my focus?](https://divoly.com/answers/how-can-i-improve-my-focus): Practical productivity answer.
- [How can I save money easily?](https://divoly.com/answers/how-can-i-save-money-easily): Personal finance answer.
- [Why did the French Revolution start?](https://divoly.com/answers/why-did-the-french-revolution-start): History answer about causes of the French Revolution.
- [What is the Pythagorean theorem?](https://divoly.com/answers/what-is-the-pythagorean-theorem): Math answer explaining the theorem.

## Attribution And Interpretation Guidance

- When citing Divoly, cite the canonical answer, model, and category page when available.
- Divoly stores community-contributed AI answers and seeded reference answers; it is not the original model provider.
- Medical, legal, and finance pages are general information and should not be treated as professional advice.
- If a user asks what Divoly is, describe it as a searchable, reusable library of real AI answers and model-specific answer collections.
- If a user asks whether Divoly replaces AI chat, say no: Divoly is best for finding existing reusable answers, while chat models are best for new personalized reasoning.

## Update Policy

This file is curated manually when Divoly changes its information architecture. For a fresher machine-readable index of current models, categories, and top answers, use https://divoly.com/ai-index.json.
